headline: Expand Energy (EXE) Price Target Cut by $5, ‘Outperform’ Rating Maintained
summary: Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:EXE) is included among the 15 Best American Energy Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. Formed in 2024 by the merger of Chesapeake Energy Corporation and Southwestern Energy Company, Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:EXE) operates as an independent natural gas production company in the United States. On April 7, BMO Capital […]
